1879.reason: [When encountering a single '&', it should not add "&&" token but should only report error 'a'. Adding "&&" token is incorrect and will cause parsing errors.]

1888.reason: [When encountering a single '|', it should not add "||" token but should only report error 'a'. Adding "||" token is incorrect and will cause parsing errors.]
